{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114254547137656F16F2520D70C"}"},"total":61},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535704971011506968","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"个人感觉挺好看的，角色都特别鲜活，感情描写的非常到位[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]，一直在追，本来以为很长的，没想到这么快就完结了，完全不够看啊，找本好看的不容易啊[哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754547213,"group_id":"7519024664652287038","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机更字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4/85REg/xRrZ4m5soBVWpzUjZiDLmaja7+hNJ7qteM+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1836635174475444","user_name":"超级想吃软饭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1836635174475444","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1760335218,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7519024664652287038","book_info":{"abstract":"女穿男，1V1，HE
刚穿来的秦书砚就发现一个小女子正在扒拉她腰间的绦带
吓得她连滚带爬去了书房
.
秦书砚决定替原主背锅，成为了丰安县的县令，将受贿的银子发给灾民，替死去的人申冤。
一到晚上，她就战战兢兢等待小娘子的临幸。
小娘子：我们分房睡吧！
.
灾民涌进县城，瘟疫乍现，城门被封，秦书砚尽心尽力。
找大夫，粮食，药材。忙的不可开交！
和小娘子的感情却始终平平淡淡
.
直到秦书砚发现，她竟然穿到了一本书中，原身瘟疫中逼迫小娘子圆房，瘟疫到来封城后无所作为，导致瘟疫蔓延，娘子腹中孩子不保，最后被成为王妃的娘子千刀万剐，曝尸示众。
最主要的是书中的娘子另有官配。
.
看着般配的两人，秦书砚无声叹息，转身去帮助和表妹相恋的妹子。
一向沉静的娘子，不顾跑乱的头发和衣服，红着眼眸问道：你要纳妾？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o922d1900447282417972d1915e6a5f03~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小喵儿","author_id":"","book_id":"7519024664652287038","book_name":"女穿男，穿成女主的渣前夫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2673人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7519024745614950974","read_count":"2673","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"218241"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"108","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿越,今穿古,HE,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o922d1900447282417972d1915e6a5f03~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258345&x-signature=m6i35mnXlRH58WLaNM5%2FamuJ1eg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"60403312682","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"158"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114254547137656F16F2520D70C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"dig
